calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Continued To Oct-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-30-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. **NOTE: The Court intends to notify the State Bar of all the Sanction Orders as required by Business and Professions Code 6086.7(a)(3) if there is no compliance and outstanding sanctions are not paid by the next hearing date.** Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to SEP-11-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
